textByHash.80e3c8b41b52cb3debe951b007d7e2cc85ac3e04: Quiet! I'm here observing the lizardmen shamans, try not to blow my cover.
textByHash.b171ec767b3c3439992284cdd4d0176d6fdd393a: As if you could do better!
textByHash.1a36663f42b642a4491ef2d024bd50c4862785e2: The Shayzien records say you've killed lizardmen since they began tracking your kills. were lizardman shamans.
textByHash.3a4b691e24fdb30e461d73001395261d8f3b9286: Absolutely not! Do you want to get me killed? Now get out of here and stop trying to blow my cover!
textByHash.1362a72bca1b307a0b52382e88cd2e63982d23e9: Well I don't like the idea of you risking my cover. You are trusted by the Shayzien people though, so I suppose you can. Just be careful.
